---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Spiral Pool
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Problem / Use Case

What problem does this solve? Why do you need it?

## 💡 Proposed Solution

How you think this could work.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## 📊 Context

- **Coin(s):** (e.g., BTC, LTC, all)
- **Component:** (e.g., stratum, sentinel, dashboard, installer, spiralctl)
- **Deployment:** Native / Docker / Both

## 📎 Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references.
